highlights: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release with programmatic tool calling and tiered models sets a new standard for intelligent agent orchestration and cost-efficiency.

Major advancements in specialized foundation models, from Google's SensorFM for wearable health to Ant Group's LingBot-VA 2.0 for physical AI, underscore the increasing domain-specific capabilities of AI.

The rise of proactive enterprise agents and enhanced developer tools for agent building, coupled with improved LLM serving, highlights a strong industry push towards autonomous AI systems and streamlined deployment.

agents.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 With Programmatic Tool Calling
agents.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 introduces programmatic tool calling, allowing models to execute JavaScript for orchestrating tools efficiently within an isolated V8 runtime, significantly reducing token usage and enhancing agent capabilities.

agents.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
agents.summary: ChatGPT Work is introduced as an agent capable of taking actions across applications and files, persisting on projects for extended periods, and transforming complex goals into completed work.

agents.title: Agentic Neural Architecture Search
agents.summary: AgentNAS proposes a method where an LLM generates a seed architecture and decomposes it into a slotted architecture for conventional Neural Architecture Search, automating task-specific search space definition and setting new state-of-the-art on 11 tasks.

models.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna): A Three-Tier Model Family
models.summary: OpenAI's new GPT-5.6 family (Sol, Terra, Luna) offers enhanced intelligence and cost-performance, with Sol leading in coding agent benchmarks and introducing programmatic tool calling for advanced orchestration.

models.title: Google Research Introduces SensorFM: Wearable Health Foundation Model
models.summary: SensorFM is a new wearable health foundation model from Google, pretrained on over one trillion minutes of sensor data from 5 million participants, demonstrating superior performance on 34 of 35 health tasks.

models.title: Ant Group’s Robbyant Unveils LingBot-VA 2.0: Causal Video-Action Model for Physical AI
models.summary: LingBot-VA 2.0 is a Physical AI video-action foundation model built natively for embodied intelligence, featuring Foresight Reasoning, real-time re-grounding, and high-frequency asynchronous control for advanced robotic applications.

tools.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API: Background Tasks, Remote MCP and More
tools.summary: Google is expanding Managed Agents in the Gemini API with new capabilities like background tasks and remote Multi-Cloud Platform (MCP) support, enabling developers to build more reliable and production-ready agents.

tools.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
tools.summary: This development introduces a native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend, significantly boosting LLM serving efficiency and throughput for developers deploying large language models.

tools.title: Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot
tools.summary: SkyPilot integration with Hugging Face offers zero-egress storage, allowing developers to run AI workloads across any cloud while storing data on Hugging Face without incurring egress fees, simplifying multi-cloud data management.

companies.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6: Frontier Intelligence that Scales with Your Ambition
companies.summary: OpenAI officially launched GPT-5.6 across three tiers (Sol, Terra, Luna), emphasizing enhanced intelligence, performance, and the crucial new programmatic tool calling feature for advanced developer applications.

companies.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
companies.summary: Microsoft 365 Copilot now uses GPT-5.6 as its preferred model, integrating stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork to accelerate and improve work quality for enterprise users.

companies.title: Meta Superintelligence Labs Releases Muse Spark 1.1: A Multimodal Reasoning Model for Agentic Tasks
companies.summary: Meta Superintelligence Labs released Muse Spark 1.1, a multimodal reasoning model designed for agentic tasks with a 1,000,000-token context window and multi-agent delegation, alongside a public preview of the Meta Model API.

learning.title: How to Build a T4-Friendly Autonomous Data Science Agent
learning.summary: A comprehensive guide on building an autonomous data science agent using DeepAnalyze-8B, covering environment setup, model loading for limited GPU memory, sandboxed code execution, and iterative analysis for generating analyst-grade reports.

learning.title: Aligning Clinical Needs and AI Capabilities: A Survey on LLMs for Medical Reasoning
learning.summary: This survey and benchmark dataset provide a dual-view approach to medical LLMs, connecting clinical practice with computational methods and evaluating 18 state-of-the-art models across five levels of medical reasoning capability.

learning.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
learning.summary: OpenAI introduces GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark designed to test and evaluate AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets, aiding in the development of robust scientific AI.
